summary_en: No citing works were found for this dataset via the OpenAlex citation graph (filter=cites:W7166593980 confirmed cited_by_count=0 on the dataset's own OpenAlex record) or via a Europe PMC fallback search for the dataset name and DOI (both returned 0 hits). This is consistent with the dataset's very recent publication date (2026-06-29, version 1.0.4), only about three weeks before the date of this search (2026-07-21) — too little time has elapsed for downstream papers to appear. No literature currently exists that has used this dataset, so no task/method classification is possible yet. Saturation is low by default since the dataset is effectively unused so far, representing an open opportunity rather than a saturated space.
